scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$3] From: [$4] To: [$5];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 OPTIONS Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:30
